_readme: Generic single-local-model preset for llama.cpp llama-server or llama-swap. Every tier routes to your one local model at $0; nothing ever routes to a cloud model. Env: LLMOPS_MODEL_CONFIG=configs/local-only.json LLMOPS_LOCAL_BASE_URL=http://localhost:8080/v1 LLMOPS_LOCAL_MODEL=<your model key> (classifier vars optional — omit to use the keyword classifier only)
